overview: TaxCore is a multi-tenant ITR workflow and status tracking system for CA firms and tax professionals. It provides client management, document tracking, work processing, billing, alerts, and role-based access with a powerful Super Admin control panel for firm governance.
features: Super Admin control panel with firm management and trial/paid controls
Multi-tenant firm management with Trial/Paid plan enforcement
Client workflow tracking with ITR filing date and status automation
Real-time sync across all devices via ICP canister backend
Bell icon deadline alerts with urgency color coding
Audit log with full activity tracking
One-click Excel export for all modules
